nodes.label: NoProp: Training neural networks without full back-propagation or full forward-propagation
nodes.source_file: raw/NOPROP- TRAINING NEURAL NETWORKS WITHOUT FULL BACK-PROPAGATION OR FULL FORWARD-PROPAGATION.pdf
nodes.author: Li, Teh, Pascanu (CoLLAs 2025)

nodes.label: Each block trained independently with only local backprop — no global forward or backward pass across blocks
nodes.source_file: raw/NOPROP- TRAINING NEURAL NETWORKS WITHOUT FULL BACK-PROPAGATION OR FULL FORWARD-PROPAGATION.pdf

nodes.label: Diffusion/flow-matching training signal: block t learns to denoise z_{t-1} toward class embedding u_y (fixed noised target)
nodes.source_file: raw/NOPROP- TRAINING NEURAL NETWORKS WITHOUT FULL BACK-PROPAGATION OR FULL FORWARD-PROPAGATION.pdf

nodes.label: NoProp loss = ELBO of variational diffusion: cross-entropy at final block + KL + Σ_t SNR-weighted L2 denoise loss
nodes.source_file: raw/NOPROP- TRAINING NEURAL NETWORKS WITHOUT FULL BACK-PROPAGATION OR FULL FORWARD-PROPAGATION.pdf

nodes.label: Input x AND label y broadcast to every block; no hierarchical feature assembly — non-hierarchical representation claim
nodes.source_file: raw/NOPROP- TRAINING NEURAL NETWORKS WITHOUT FULL BACK-PROPAGATION OR FULL FORWARD-PROPAGATION.pdf

nodes.label: Blocks trained in parallel (per sampled t) — no sequential forward/backward dependency; comparable to full BP on MNIST/CIFAR-10/100
nodes.source_file: raw/NOPROP- TRAINING NEURAL NETWORKS WITHOUT FULL BACK-PROPAGATION OR FULL FORWARD-PROPAGATION.pdf

nodes.label: Flow-matching variant: learn vector field v_θ(z_t,x,t) ≈ z1-z0 between noise and label embedding
nodes.source_file: raw/NOPROP- TRAINING NEURAL NETWORKS WITHOUT FULL BACK-PROPAGATION OR FULL FORWARD-PROPAGATION.pdf
